reviews.originalComment: Saya sangat puas dengan pengalaman menginap di hotel ini. Stafnya ramah dan selalu siap membantu. Kamar bersih, rapi, serta nyaman untuk beristirahat. Sarapan enak dengan variasi menu yang cukup. Lokasinya juga strategis, dekat dengan pusat kota dan tempat makan. Recommended sekali!
reviews.reviewComments: I am very satisfied with my stay at this hotel. The staff is friendly and always ready to help. The room is clean, tidy, and comfortable for resting. The breakfast is delicious with a good variety of menu options. The location is also strategic, close to the city center and places to eat. Highly recommended!

reviews.reviewPositives: in the middle of the city centre

reviews.reviewTitle: Comfortable, delicious food, clean and close to the mall.
reviews.originalTitle: Ternyaman, makanan enak, bersih dan dekat mall
reviews.originalComment: Hotel terawat, pelayanan ramah cocok untuk yang ingin belanja ke suzuya mall.
reviews.reviewComments: Well-maintained hotel, friendly service suitable for those who want to shop at Suzuya Mall.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Colazione troppo tipica, poche scelte per una colazione internazionale. Dalla mia stanza si sentiva troppo l’Adhan alle 4:30.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bagus dan bersih. Dekat dengan mall suzuya, bisa jalan kaki. Resepsionisnya ramah dan baik. Kamar kami di upgrade dari deluxe ke signature. Terimakasih banyak ya. Nanti kami nginap lagi di hotel rasamala 🥰
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is nice and clean. It's close to the Suzuya mall, within walking distance. The receptionists are friendly and kind. Our room was upgraded from deluxe to signature. Thank you very much! We will stay again at the Rasamala hotel 🥰

reviews.reviewPositives: The location just walking distance to the mall with lots of food choices.. The receptionist and the bell boy very good helping the guest unload the bags from the rental car..the breakfast also good with so many food varieties.. Will always stay here everytime come to aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, lumayan besar cocok utk bawa anak2, harga terjangkau, lokasi mudah ditemukan, dan staffnya ramah2. Thx
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, fairly spacious suitable for bringing children, affordable price, easy to find location, and the staff are friendly. Thanks.

reviews.reviewTitle: Not worth the value of money. Of you like to stay for a short trip you may consider this hotel. The hotel is just like a
reviews.reviewPositives: The location is the main key.. near to mall which is opposite hotel.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The hotel they gave to me without any window. Asking for queen bed and endup they gave me 2 single bed room. The gym facilities is the worse of all.. no maintenance at all and it’s dirty.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, sarapan oke, lokasi dekat dengan mall dan tempat makan,
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, breakfast is okay, location is close to the mall and dining places.

reviews.reviewPositives: Location close to restaurants and pasar. Nice helpfull staff.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Because of the Ramadan, breakfast without coffee was served in the room at 7 am, which of course is not the same as a self service in the restaurant.

reviews.originalComment: Rekomendasi, lokasi , staf, kebersihan,staf tanggap, membantu customer dengan sangat profesional. Hotel *3 rasa *5
reviews.reviewComments: Recommendation, location, staff, cleanliness, responsive staff, helping customers very professionally. A hotel with a *3 star feel and *5 star service.

reviews.originalComment: Harga terjangkau, lokasi strategis, staf hotel ramah, kamar bersih dan sarapan juga enak, overall baguss
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable prices, strategic location, friendly hotel staff, clean rooms, and delicious breakfast, overall very good.

reviews.originalComment:
Resepsionisnya ramah dan juga sangat informatif,, kamar hotel bersih dan nyaman, untuk parkir mobil juga luas dan mudah untuk di akses, akses untuk kuliner dan suzuya mall juga sangat dekat
Pengalaman menginap di hotel Banda Aceh yang sangat berkesan, saya akan kembali menginap di hotel rasamala jika liburan ke Banda Aceh,,
reviews.reviewComments: The receptionist is friendly and very informative, the hotel room is clean and comfortable, the parking lot is spacious and easily accessible, and the access to dining options and Suzuya Mall is also very close. A very memorable experience staying at the hotel in Banda Aceh, I will return to stay at the Rasamala hotel when I go on vacation to Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel ini itu ada 2 lift, kamarnya lumayan luas dan harganya terjangkau. Tapi beneran deh stafnya ramah banget, pertama aku dapat kamar yang nggak ada jendelanya padahal aku request di Agoda yang ada jendelanya trus turun dong aku bilang ke resepsionisnya bahwa aku request yang ada jendelanya langsung di ganti kamarnya, trus sarapannya enak²..
Pokoknya best lah
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel has 2 elevators, the rooms are quite spacious, and the prices are affordable. But seriously, the staff is very friendly. At first, I got a room without windows even though I requested a room with a window on Agoda, so I went down and told the receptionist that I requested a room with a window, and they immediately changed my room. Also, the breakfast is delicious. Overall, it's the best!

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, staf responsif, staf semua sangat ramah dan membantu tamu. Receommended 3 hari nginap d sini
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, the staff is responsive, and everyone is very friendly and helpful to the guests. Recommended to stay here for 3 days.
Depan hotel ada kedai makan. Nak ke Suzuya Mall hanya jalan kaki sahaja. Sarapan pagi ada banyak pilihan makanan. Bilik bersih. Staf peramah. All good.

reviews.originalComment:
Pertama kali menginap di Banda Aceh bersama keluarga, kami memilih hotel rasamala karena review juga dari agoda maupun google. Dan ternyata memang wow,... Petugas ramah dan fasilitas lengkap serta dekat dengan pusat perbelanjaan. Benar-benar pengalaman yang berkesan dan menyenangkan. 

Semoga lancar trus hotelnya.
reviews.reviewComments:
For the first time staying in Banda Aceh with my family, we chose Rasamala Hotel because of the reviews from Agoda and Google. And it turned out to be wow,... The staff was friendly, the facilities were complete, and it was close to the shopping center. It was truly a memorable and enjoyable experience. 

I hope the hotel continues to do well.

reviews.originalComment: Ramah, Nyaman, dekat kemanapun, sangat baik di hotel sekelasnya. Kalau k banda bakal balik lg sih ke hotel ini
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable, convenient to anywhere, very good for its class. If I go back to Banda, I would definitely return to this hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Enak Buat Yang Cari Makanan karena dekat dengan Suzuya Mall Tinggal menyebrang saja
reviews.reviewComments: Good for those looking for food because it is near Suzuya Mall, just cross the street.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel terbaik. Orangtua sangat senang karna diberi kamar yang amat sangat bagus dengan view
reviews.reviewComments: The best hotel. My parents are very happy because they were given a very nice room with a great view.

I had a pleasant stay at Rasamala Hotel, Aceh. The hotel itself is very nice, clean, and comfortable, making it a great place to relax after a long day.
One of the best things about this hotel is its strategic location. There are plenty of food options nearby, including restaurants and local stalls, so finding something to eat is very easy. There is also a convenience mart similar to 7-Eleven within walking distance. Additionally, a shopping mall is located just opposite the hotel, which can be easily reached on foot.
Overall, Rasamala Hotel offers great comfort and excellent convenience. Highly recommended for travelers looking for a comfortable stay with easy access to food and shopping. Recommended!

Clean room
Nice hotel
Staff also polite and helpful
Near to suzuya mall
Just in front of the hotel
Also near with food stall and restaurant
Will come again for sure!

reviews.originalComment: Visit ke Banda, hotel ini menjadi salah satu pilihan terfavorit ku. Tempatnya strategis dan nyaman untuk beristirahat
reviews.reviewComments: During my visit to Banda, this hotel became one of my favorite choices. The location is strategic and comfortable for resting.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel paling strategis kalau ajak keluarga
reviews.reviewComments:
Hotel nya bersih dan yang penting dekat pusat perbelanjaan Suzuya, karena niat nya memang hanya ingin ke Suzuya dan mencari hotel paling dekat dengan Suzuya.. Akhirnya Rasamala Hotel pilihannya.. 

Mulai dari masuk staff nya sangat friendly, Kamar bersih dan semua perlengkapan dikamar mandi tersedia (Handuk, Sabun, Shampoo, Sikat Gigi) note : bagi yang tidak bawa perlengkapan mandi.

Kalau cuaca tidak memungkinkan utk keluar cari makan diluar bisa langsung ke Lt. 2 ada Cafe Resto "RumahCafe" Yang menu makan dan minumnya sangat lengkap. Suasana nya lumayan nyaman, Tenang, serasa punya Cafe pribadi 😁

Terimakasih Rasamala Hotel atas layanannya selama 3 hari 2 malam saya dan keluarga menginap disini 🙏

reviews.reviewTitle: Boleh la tuk harga nya pas discount
reviews.reviewComments: Untuk kamar nya krg bersih, bantal di dalam nya da dot” hitam jamur gt, alangkah baik nya di ganti itu bantal yg sudah berjamur krn juga ngak bagus untuk kesehatan. jadi tidur rasa nya jg krg nyaman. Dinding bercak air lembab bekas air gt banyak, jadi kamar nya ada bau ngak enak gitu, bau pengap ato apa. Untuk sarapan nya enak banyak pilihan menu nya. Pas dapat itu harga murah jadi ok la. Staff nya juga ramah. Air panas berfungsi dengan baik.

reviews.originalComment:
Dengan tidak diberikan kunci kamar 2ea, untuk beli susu & keperluan bayi terpaksa bayi di bawa². Diharapkan kunci extra bisa diberikan sesuai kebutuhan, semestinya bisa lebih fleksibel.
Rasa makanan saat sarapan bisa lebih ditingkatkan lagi. Varian menu sudah  ok.
reviews.reviewComments: Without being given the room key 2ea, to buy milk and baby necessities, the baby had to be brought along. It is hoped that extra keys can be provided as needed; it should be more flexible. The taste of the food at breakfast can be improved further. The menu variations are already okay.
Room was not particularly big but was okay. Location was good and near to shopping area
Hotel cantik, selesa, dekat dengan kedai makan itik bakar, dekat dengan mall. Walking distance 🔛🔝 brekafst pun sedap. Sesuai dengan harga hotel ni.
Sangat selesa. Bilik luas. Berhampiran banyak fastfood. Saya ambik 6 bilik untuk kami sekeluarga besar.

Hotel is very clean.located near the mall and surrounding lot of restaurant local.
Staff is very friendly and very helpful.
Good
Good clean hotel. Compact bedroom but cozy. Good breakfast helpful reception. Next to Suzuka Mall and food stalls around with coffee cafes nearby.

Was pleasantly surprised with the comfort of the room. Super clean, nice view, and very comfortable.  
Could use another coat of paint though, you can see cracks (earthquake damage maybe?) All through the walls beneath the paint.  

I would definitely stay here again!
 I would stay 8n this room again in a heartbeat

It may be not great value with money due to falsify cost of agoda, they said it would cost 460ish before tax but increased a lot on to 750 is (i spend 1.5 mio rupiah) 

But the great thing, the location is very strategist located upfront of a mall and a lot of store also restaurant, great place to stay
The cleanliness is great, the facility is good enough

The AC isn't really cool at first, you need to wait for an enough time

Overall i'll say it 4/5

There are still a lot of improvement needed
Bersih. Lokasi strategik. Depan hotel ada kedai makan. ada mall. ada richeese. hanya jalan kaki

reviews.reviewTitle: Lokasi strategis depan Mall Suzuya baru
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel harga TERMURAH dikelas nya, dapat room upgrade, staff ramah, check in cepat, bersih, air hangat lancar, makan pagi enaaak, dan yg terpenting tinggal nyebrang ke Mall Suzuya baru!

I have nothing to complain, the hotel is what you can have with an average budget, they offer good and friendly service, I really enjoyed my stay there, most probably will come to the same place if I ever visit aceh again!

Hotel yg bersih dn terbaik...sarapan sedap....
Layann pon alhamdulillah bagus
Selimut empuk..lena tidurnya....

Really clean hotel and very comfortable bed. Karaoke until 21:30 and in typical style awful singing. Plenty of convenience stores and a number of restaurants. Took 20 min in taxi to airport 06:00. Will stay here again for another overnight/ transit stay

Friendly service.
The staff was very helpful when we asked her regarding the tourism places. She even adviced us to put on proper dress code when visiting the Grand Mosque that survived during the Sunami.
Things are mediocre but one of the best you can find there I think. Locational wise it’s great.
Jalan kki untuk ke mall
Very clean and cozy. Will repeat again
strategic loc, good staff
Kamar besar dan nyaman

Bagus, bersih, nyaman

Hotelnya bagus, bersih, nyaman, lokasi sangat strategis
oke sih
Bed not convenient when wake up after sleep feel back pain
Clean and comfortable. Need to improve facilities
Just in front of a small mall.

Hotel terletak di kawasan yang strategik

Hotel bersih dan selesa
Clean and friendly staff. Nice location. Recommend for next trip..
Tempat nya bersih, staffnya ramah, strategis tempatnya
Kamar bersih, staff ramah, tempat strategis

reviews.reviewTitle: One of the Best Hotel in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Very close to the Biggest Shopping Mall in Banda Aceh
Welcoming staff, well appointed room, lovely breafast
The bed sheet cleanliness have to improve, overall good stay.
Good place and service
Very clean and comfortable

Blik bersih
Staf friendly
Aircond HP need to upgrade for better cooling inside room.

I would say, it worths the money how ever,  the room needs to be improved, it seems the room is low maintenance.
Ohya one more, the key card cannot closed with the phone, it will reset the setting and I need to go to reception to program it again, it was hassle.

The breakfast was nice, the staf is friendly, the location is perfect. 

I would recommend to stay here. 

Thank you..
Nice place
Nice place, strategic location

Nice hotel...recommended for family travellers

I do not recommend, staff had to manually remove the lightbulb at 2am from the entrance because there is no light switch for it. The AC went crazy and started being too load 30min later. And the bed sheets had stains on then. Lastly, the bathroom could use a good scrubbing
No edc machine, can’t use credit card or debit card. So complicated. No smile or even thank you from the male front desk staff .
Lebih seru klau ada kolam renang....
I bought this hotel for a night assume to pay 800 rp. But got discount by a hotel or agoda. Than facilitite me with Supercheap room quality. Which l can get even cheaper at other hotels.
The facility OK and clean

Friendly staff and room is clean.
The staff offered me to upgrade my room at no cost since they have available roomm

comfort for sleep, and culinary hunting, before continue the tour in the next day. Nice!

The place so strategic, nearest to suzuya mall, and east to get baiturrahman mosque... 
Staff so humble,, room so clean an cozy... 
Beverage so delucious... Specially "nasi goreng cina" We love it souch... 

Hopely we can book again... Thanks

reviews.originalComment: Kesan pertama ke hotel sangan bersih dan nyaman, bakal balik lagi ke banda dan nginap di rasamala
reviews.reviewComments: The first impression of the hotel is very clean and comfortable, I will definitely return to Banda and stay at Rasamala again.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel yang nyaman untuk menginap
Lokasi juga sangat strategis..
reviews.reviewComments: A comfortable hotel to stay in. The location is also very strategic.

reviews.originalComment: Alhamdulillah, hotelnya bersih dan nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Thank God, the hotel is clean and comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel sangat strategi, kamar sangat nyaman sekali
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is very strategically located, and the rooms are extremely comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis , depan hotel banyak jual makanan , room clean , ok
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location, many food options in front of the hotel, room clean, okay.
Room is clean . Facilities are superb and service is great.. highly recommended!

reviews.originalComment: Hotel yang nyaman, harga terjangkau, dekat dengan pusat perbelanjaan
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable hotel, affordable price, close to shopping centers.

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya bersih dan lokasi hotel dekat dengan kota
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and the hotel location is close to the city.

reviews.originalComment: 位置不错，对面就是商场。员工服务态度很好。设施有点旧，被子和床单不是很干净，卫生不是很干净。
reviews.reviewComments: The location is great, the mall is right across the street. The staff's service attitude is very good. The facilities are a bit old, the quilts and sheets are not very clean, and the hygiene is not very good.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel di sebrang mall. Tempat makan gampang dicari. Hotel lumayan bersih. Stafd juga ramah.
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel across from the mall. Places to eat are easy to find. The hotel is fairly clean. The staff is also friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi sangat strategis, sekitar hotel ada makanan , hotel bersih petugas ramaj
reviews.reviewComments: The location is very strategic, there are food options around the hotel, the hotel is clean and the staff is friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel yg bersih,bagus dan tempat yg strategis👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: Clean and nice hotel in a strategic location.👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment:
Dekat kemana mana 
Bersih 
Nyaman
Next time tetep jadi pilihan
reviews.reviewComments:
Close to everything 
Clean 
Comfortable 
Next time will still be a choice

reviews.originalComment: Kalau ke banda Aceh pasti nginap nya di rasamala, udah Oke banget hotel nya nyaman pwool, mbak receptionist nya juga baik banget, kamar bersih harga juga Oke.. Best la pokoknya ni hotel 👍
reviews.reviewComments: If you go to Banda Aceh, you should definitely stay at Rasamala. The hotel is really nice and comfortable, the receptionist is very friendly, the rooms are clean, and the prices are good. This hotel is the best! 👍

reviews.originalComment: Sudah 2 kali menginap di Rasamala, masih tetap bersih, pelayanan ramah, penerangan OK, lokasi di lingkungan yang ramai banyak warung/cafe, sarapan enak, suka dengan gorengan bakwan dan tempe mendoannya.. 👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: I have stayed at Rasamala twice, and it is still clean, friendly service, good lighting, located in a busy area with many stalls/cafes, delicious breakfast, I like the fried snacks and tempe mendoan.. 👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment:
Lokasi strategis, kebersihan kamar dan fasilitas lainnya, staff yang super ramah dan harga yang masuk akal.
Kami tiba jam 02.00 dinihari dan masih dilayani dengan baik dan cepat, bahkan ketika kami sadar bahwa tanggal check in kami salah hal tersebut bisa dikondisikan tanpa biaya sepeserpun
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location, cleanliness of the room and other facilities, super friendly staff, and reasonable prices. We arrived at 2:00 AM and were still treated well and quickly, even when we realized that our check-in date was wrong, it could be adjusted without any charge.

reviews.originalComment: Saya menginap selama 3 malam, Alhamdulillah senang di hotel ini. Kamarnya sangat bersih dan nyaman. Pelayanan cepat dan ramah. Letaknya sangat strategis, dekat kemana-mana. Parkirnya juga sangat mudah. Harganya juga sesuai banget dengan fasilitas dan pelayanannya. Insyaallah akan menginap lagi disini kalau ke Aceh.
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed for 3 nights, thank God I enjoyed this hotel. The room is very clean and comfortable. The service is fast and friendly. The location is very strategic, close to everywhere. Parking is also very easy. The price is very suitable for the facilities and service. God willing, I will stay here again if I go to Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Banyak2 hotel kat Aceh , hotel ni paling lawa lah aku rasa. Bersih. Toilet clean. Berbaloi lah harga dengan keadaan hotel superb. Manthol pak abu!!!!
reviews.reviewComments: There are many hotels in Aceh, but I think this one is the most beautiful. It's clean. The toilet is clean. The price is worth it considering the superb condition of the hotel. Manthol Pak Abu!!!!

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya nyaman. Bersih. Dingin. Ada air hangat. Recommended deh pokoknya. Puas dgn pelayanan hotel ini
reviews.reviewComments: The room is comfortable. Clean. Cold. There is hot water. Highly recommended overall. Satisfied with the service at this hotel.
Für 1 Nacht okay. Kleine Zimmer ohne Fenster. Sauberkeit, nicht so genau hinsehen. Personal spricht kaum bis kein englisch. Lage ist gut
Hotel yang baik ... masuk 4 org bilik Signature dgn extra bed ... tiada masalah ... layanan sangat baik
Mantapp
Sangat memudahkan bersih dan cantik
Bagus
Saya pertama menggunakan aplikasi agoda.

Good hotel to stay, mo kemana mana deket. Makanan dekat hotel juga enak enak. Lokasi hotel jg dipinggir jalan denga  akses parkir untuk kendaraan yang cukup memadai. Kamar hotel bagus dan breakfast okay walau prasmanannya hanya tertentu pilihannya.
Kamarnya termasuk kecil sih untuk sekelas harga segitu

Pengalaman pertama kali menginap, tadinya ingin merasakan hotel rasamala yang keliatan nya keren dan dekat dengan suzuya, ternyata memang keren hotelnya, kamarnya dan pelayanannya, saya sangat puas, dibantu dengan resepsionis Bang Chandra yang siap sedia membantu tamu, rekomendasi untuk menginap disini
The room was very messy. There were stains on the sheets.
到韦岛前过夜的酒店，位置便利，对面就是大超市
總體還不錯，去韋島的途徑地，環境乾淨。
Bagus banget hotelnya.ga akan nyesal nginap Dsni.sarapan nya enak2 masya Allah..nx klo mati listrik lagi d rumah nginap lagi Dsni..
tak seperti tampilan luarnya yg megah, dalamnya perlu banyak peremajaan tertipu dengan tampilan luarnya yg megah
Dari tempat,pelayanan, kebersihan semuanya mantul
